title: IOMAD
description: IOMAD is a multi-tenant Moodle distribution that turns Moodle into a SaaS e-learning platform for managing multiple companies, departments and clients.
installation: IOMAD is a Moodle distribution and requires MySQL/MariaDB (Moodle does not support PostgreSQL in these images), so this template ships the mariadb add-on. The actively-maintained dedicated image is elestio/iomad (rebuilt against current IOMAD releases). On first boot the container runs the Moodle/IOMAD installer against the database using the MYSQL_* env vars and provisions the admin account from ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD; set MOODLE_URL/SSL_PROXY are supplied so links resolve to the public HTTPS URL. After deploy, log in with the seeded admin and ROTATE: the ADMIN_PASSWORD env value, the MariaDB add-on password, and configure real SMTP under Site administration > Server > Email. Two persistent volumes are mounted: /var/www/html holds the IOMAD/Moodle code plus config.php, and /var/www/moodledata holds uploaded course files, caches and sessions. For production raise the app pod size (Moodle/PHP needs >=1Gi) and PHP memory_limit, and run Moodle cron. No external object store or search engine is required for a base install (add an external Elasticsearch/Solr later only if you enable global search).
